zh.lifeSummary: 當Llywelyn ap Gruffydd Prince of North Wales於1223年出生在英國威爾斯尼德時，他的父親Gruffydd ap Llywelyn Fawr28歲，母親Senana ferch Caradog25歲。他於1278年10月13日與Eleanor de Montfort在威爾士結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1282年12月11日在英國威爾斯波斯阿貝雷德福享年59歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯波斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Llywelyn ap Gruffydd Prince of North Wales于1223年出生在英国威尔斯尼德时，他的父亲Gruffydd ap Llywelyn Fawr28岁，母亲Senana ferch Caradog25岁。他于1278年10月13日与Eleanor de Montfort在威尔士结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1282年12月11日在英国威尔斯波斯阿貝雷德福享年59岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯波斯。

nameMeanings.name: Gruffydd
meanings: Welsh: The Welsh name; from creffydd, strong faith, or strong in faith. Gruffydd, a Welsh form of Gryffydd.

nameMeanings.name: Llywelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Llewelyn
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: When Llywelyn ap Gruffydd Prince of North Wales was born in 1223, in Gwynedd, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Gruffydd ap Llywelyn Fawr, was 28 and his mother, Senana ferch Caradog, was 25. He married Eleanor de Montfort on 13 October 1278, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 11 December 1282, in Aberedw, Powys, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 59, and was buried in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Llywelyn ap Gruffydd Prince of North Wales est né en 1223, à Gwynedd, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gruffydd ap Llywelyn Fawr, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Senana ferch Caradog, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor de Montfort le 13 octobre 1278, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 11 décembre 1282, à Aberedw, Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Llywelyn ap Gruffydd Prince of North Wales 1223 in Gwynedd, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gruffydd ap Llywelyn Fawr 28 und seine Mutter Senana ferch Caradog 25. Er hat am 13. Oktober 1278 in Wales Eleanor de Montfort geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 11. Dezember 1282 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Aberedw, Powys, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Llywelyn ap Gruffydd Prince of North Wales è nato il nel 1223 nel Gwynedd, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Gruffydd ap Llywelyn Fawr, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Senana ferch Caradog, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor de Montfort il 13 ottobre 1278, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 11 dicembre 1282, nel Aberedw, Powys, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Powys, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Llywelyn ap Gruffydd Prince of North Walesが1223年にイギリスウェールズグウイネッドで生まれた時，父Gruffydd ap Llywelyn Fawrは28歳，母Senana ferch Caradogは25歳であった。1278年10月13日にウェールズでEleanor de Montfortと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1282年12月11日にイギリスウェールズポウイスアバーエドウで59歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズポウイスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Llywelyn ap Gruffydd Prince of North Wales(이)가 1223년 영국 웨일스 그윈드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gruffydd ap Llywelyn Fawr(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Senana ferch Caradog(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1278년 10월 13일 웨일스에서 Eleanor de Montfort(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1282년 12월 11일 영국 웨일스 파우이스 압레드w에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 파우이스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Llywelyn ap Gruffydd Prince of North Wales nasceu em 1223, em Gwynedd, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gruffydd ap Llywelyn Fawr, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Senana ferch Caradog, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor de Montfort em 13 de outubro de 1278, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de dezembro de 1282, em Aberedw, Powys, Gales, United Kingdom, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Powys, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Llywelyn ap Gruffydd Prince of North Wales родился в 1223 г. в местности гвинедд, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gruffydd ap Llywelyn Fawr было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Senana ferch Caradog, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor de Montfort 13 октября 1278 г. в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 11 декабря 1282 г. в местности абиредв, поуис, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности поуис, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Llywelyn ap Gruffydd Prince of North Wales nació en 1223, en Gwynedd, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Gruffydd ap Llywelyn Fawr, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Senana ferch Caradog, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Eleanor de Montfort el 13 de octubre de 1278, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 11 de diciembre de 1282, en Aberedw, Powys, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Powys, Gales, Reino Unido.
